---
title: "My title"
subtitle: "My subtitle if needed"
author: 
  - Jet McCullough
  - William Chan
thanks: "Code and data are available at: [https://github.com/jethroid/INF2167-Proposal-Group-2](https://github.com/jethroid/INF2167-Proposal-Group-2)."
date: June 18, 2026
date-format: long
format: pdf
number-sections: true
bibliography: proposal_references.bib
---

```{r}
#| include: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(tidyverse)
library(palmerpenguins)
```

# Research Questions


# Literature Review


# Dataset and Methods


# Exploratory Data Analysis


\newpage

# References
